properties.text: The Gravemoor swallows the road north of Hearthfall. Somewhere in these drowned barrows the occupation caged the loyalists who would not kneel - and the quartermaster who sold them out waits under guard at the crossroads. Free the three cages, then decide what a Warden's justice weighs.
THE GRAVEMOOR - the moor keeps what the usurper buries. Three barrow-crypts: west, east, and north.

properties.description: Free the caged loyalists and pass judgment on the traitor quartermaster.

properties.text: The west barrow cage breaks open. A half-starved shieldmaiden of your father's guard climbs out and salutes with a bound fist.
The east barrow cage splits. The old signal-keeper of Hearthfall crawls free, already asking for a horn to raise the marches.
The north barrow cage falls apart. Your mother's standard-bearer stands up out of the mud, weeping, holding a folded scrap of the true banner.
A barrow older than the marches. Whoever sleeps here was buried standing, facing the keep, sword unsurrendered.
The oath-stone of the Warden's line. The carved words are mud-choked, but every loyalist in the marches knows them by heart.
A crossroads lantern, kept burning by no one anyone has ever seen. Moor-folk say it lights the way home for the wrongly buried.
